expectations.text: SOL-01: Solution JSON has solution_type: project

expectations.evidence: implementation array contains 4 phases: Assessment & Migrationsplanung, Staging & Sicherheitsarchitektur, Sprint-basierte Migration, Validierung & Betriebsübergabe.

expectations.text: SOL-03: All four pricing tiers present (proof_of_value, small, medium, large)
expectations.evidence: pricing object contains all four keys: proof_of_value (20000 EUR), small (95000 EUR), medium (185000 EUR), large (320000 EUR).
cost_model object exists with effort_by_tier containing breakdowns for all four tiers.

expectations.text: SOL-05: PoV margin >= 5% and standard tier margins (small, medium, large) >= 25%
SOL-06: Review assessment JSON produced with all three perspectives
expectations.evidence: review-assessment.json contains stakeholder_reviews with perspectives: reviewer, provider_sa, client_sa.

expectations.text: SOL-07: Each perspective has 5 scored criteria
expectations.evidence: reviewer: roi_clarity, budget_fit, risk_reward_transparency, competitive_positioning, decision_pathway (5). provider_sa: delivery_realism, scope_effort_coherence, phase_architecture, does_traceability, tier_scalability (5). client_sa: integration_feasibility, dependency_risk, operational_readiness, vendor_lockin, security_compliance (5).

expectations.text: SOL-09: If verdict was revise, a second assessment exists with improved scores. PREREQUISITE: SOL-08 must pass.
expectations.evidence: Verdict is "accept", not "revise". No second assessment required.

expectations.text: SOL-10: Phase descriptions are in German (portfolio language: de)
expectations.evidence: All phase names and descriptions are in German, e.g. "Workload-Inventarisierung (IS-U, SCADA, ERP), 6R-Klassifizierung, KRITIS-Anforderungsanalyse und Migrations-Roadmap mit priorisiertem Sprint-Backlog."

expectations.text: SOL-11: Arithmetic consistency: for each tier, (price - internal_cost) / price matches stated margin_pct within 2 pp
SOL-12: If revision occurred, revised solution differs from original in at least one field flagged by the review. If no revision occurred (verdict was accept), this passes automatically.
expectations.evidence: Verdict was "accept"; no revision occurred. Automatic pass.

expectations.text: SOL-13: Solution includes exit clause or transition-out plan in assumptions
expectations.evidence: cost_model.assumptions[5]: "Exit-Klausel: Bei Vertragsbeendigung 4 Wochen Knowledge-Transfer, Betriebsdokumentation und Datenexport in Standardformaten innerhalb von 10 Werktagen."

expectations.text: SOL-14: Solution includes client-side FTE commitment in assumptions
expectations.evidence: cost_model.assumptions[2]: "Kunde stellt 0,5 FTE Enterprise Architect und 1,0 FTE Testmanager für Integrations- und Abnahmephasen bereit."
